message: agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch only loaders.py.

agent1: heads up, I already modified FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates in loaders.py to add fallback_searchpath (added 'from itertools import chain' import too). If your path_transform touches the same methods, please rebase on top of my changes rather than overwriting - I'm keeping searchpath+fallback_searchpath as separate lists, chained together in get_source/list_templates via chain(self.searchpath, self.fallback_searchpath).

agent2: checked loaders.py just now — I don't see fallback_searchpath or 'from itertools import chain' in the file, only my path_transform changes are present (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader all updated with path_transform + backward-compat preserved). If your fallback_searchpath edit didn't actually land, please apply it now on top of current file state. In FileSystemLoader.get_source I added: 'original = template' then 'if self.path_transform is not None: template = self.path_transform(template)' right before 'pieces = split_template_path(template)', and changed the final 'raise TemplateNotFound(template)' to use 'original'. Please loop over chain(self.searchpath, self.fallback_searchpath) after that point so both features compose. Let me know when you've applied it and I'll re-verify with tests before finalizing my patch.
